question: Will May 2026 headline CPI-U rise at least 0.4% month-over-month?
reason: April 2026 CPI rose 0.6% month-over-month, indicating strong inflationary pressures.
evidence: April 2026 CPI increased by 0.6% month-over-month, the largest monthly gain since 2022.
Energy costs surged 17.8% annually in April 2026, with gasoline prices up 28.4%.
Core CPI, excluding food and energy, rose 0.4% month-over-month and 2.8% year-over-year in April 2026.
